span.p: Must you support multiple released versions at once?

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Release branches + cherry-pick hotfixes; accept the overhead

span.p: Can incomplete work hide behind a feature flag?

span.p: Fix testability/flags first; long branches are a symptom

span.p: Team merges to trunk at least daily?

span.p: Trunk-based: short-lived branches, flags for unfinished work

span.p: Move toward trunk-based; shrink branch lifetime before adding process
